display.purpose: Hero headline only (Bebas Neue), capped at 12ch.

body.purpose: Manrope running copy, measure capped at 60ch.

label.purpose: Rail timestamps, stamps, table headers; uppercase tracked.

shadows.name: board-lift
shadows.purpose: The hero scoreboard, the one element presented as a floating device.

shadows.name: screenshot-lift
shadows.purpose: Product screenshot frames (.shot), which may also bleed past the content edge.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The one easing curve. Exponential ease-out, no bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: button hover, link color, focus.

motion.name: dur-base
motion.purpose: State changes: nav border, FAQ open, rail marker.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: Section scroll reveals (fade and rise, fired once).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loudest thing on any page. Volt on ink, reserved for the trial call to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:9px; min-height:54px; padding:0 28px; border-radius:10px; background:#e8ff00; color:#0a0c10; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.04rem; text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; border:none; transition:transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#f2ff4d; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #e8ff00; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The secondary, never-yellow action: a hairline outline that fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:9px; min-height:54px; padding:0 28px; border-radius:10px; background:transparent; color:#f0f2f6; border:1px solid #252b38; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.04rem; text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:#7d8798; background:#12151c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #e8ff00; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Live Scoreboard
components.description: The hero's self-demonstration: a floating device with a running clock, score, minute-stamped event log, and a pulsing recording foot.
components.html:
1ST HALF
18:24
HV HELIOS · HC TORNADO
7 – 5
  • 18:24#7 SanneGoal
  • 17:58#1 KeeperSave
  • 17:31#4 Mila2 min
Recording
components.css: .ds-board { background:#12151c; border:1px solid #252b38; border-radius:14px; padding:20px; box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.45); font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; max-width:380px; } .ds-board-top { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; padding-bottom:18px; border-bottom:1px solid #252b38; } .ds-board-half { font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#7d8798; } .ds-board-clock { font-family:'Bebas Neue','Arial Narrow',sans-serif; font-size:2.7rem; line-height:1; color:#e8ff00; padding-top:4px; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-board-score { margin-left:auto; text-align:right; } .ds-board-score .t { font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#7d8798; } .ds-board-score .n { font-family:'Bebas Neue','Arial Narrow',sans-serif; font-size:2.7rem; line-height:1; color:#f0f2f6; padding-top:4px; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-board-log { list-style:none; margin:16px 0 0; padding:0; display:grid; gap:2px; } .ds-log-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:9px 10px; border-radius:6px; font-size:0.92rem; } .ds-log-row .t { font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; color:#7d8798; min-width:42px; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-log-row .dot { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; } .ds-log-row .who { font-weight:600; color:#f0f2f6; } .ds-log-row .what { margin-left:auto; font-size:0.83rem; color:#a7b0be; } .ds-board-foot { margin-top:14px; padding-top:14px; border-top:1px solid #252b38; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-size:0.78rem; color:#7d8798; } .ds-pulse { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:#00e87a; animation:dsPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dsPulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1;} 50%{opacity:0.3;} }

components.name: Timeline Rail
components.description: The site's structural signature: a hairline of match timestamps. Active marker is volt with a scaled dot; the only place repeating tracked labels are allowed.
components.css: .ds-rail { position:relative; padding:8px 0 8px 22px; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-rail::before { content:''; position:absolute; left:5px; top:6px; bottom:6px; width:1px; background:#252b38; } .ds-rail ul { list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0; display:grid; gap:22px; } .ds-rail li { position:relative; font-size:0.76rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#7d8798; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-rail li::before { content:''; position:absolute; left:-20px; top:5px; width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:#252b38; transition:background-color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-rail li[data-passed] { color:#a7b0be; } .ds-rail li[data-passed]::before { background:#7d8798; } .ds-rail li[data-active] { color:#e8ff00; } .ds-rail li[data-active]::before { background:#e8ff00; transform:scale(1.4); }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.description: Native <details>/<summary>. Opens with JS off; the plus icon rotates 45deg to a close. Never rebuild as buttons with aria-expanded.
components.html:
Do I need an invite code?

Yes. Accounts are created with an invite code while the product is in early access. Use Request access and a personal code comes back within 24 hours.

What do I run it on during a match?

A browser. Phone, tablet or laptop, whatever you already carry.
components.css: .ds-faq { max-width:820px; border-top:1px solid #252b38; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-faq details { border-bottom:1px solid #252b38; } .ds-faq summary { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:20px; padding:22px 0; list-style:none; font-size:1.04rem; font-weight:600; color:#f0f2f6; cursor:pointer; } .ds-faq summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none; } .ds-faq summary svg { margin-left:auto; width:18px; height:18px; flex-shrink:0; color:#7d8798; transition:transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-faq details[open] summary svg { transform:rotate(45deg); } .ds-faq .a { padding:0 0 24px; margin:0; font-size:0.97rem; color:#a7b0be; max-width:60ch; }

components.name: Language Toggle
components.description: A neutral pill group. The active language is a white pill on ink text, deliberately not volt, so yellow stays reserved for the call to action.
components.css: .ds-lang { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:2px; padding:3px; border:1px solid #252b38; border-radius:10px; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-lang button { min-height:30px; padding:0 9px; border-radius:7px; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.02em; color:#7d8798; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; transition:color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-lang button:hover { color:#f0f2f6; } .ds-lang button[aria-pressed="true"] { color:#0a0c10; background:#f0f2f6; } .ds-lang button:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #e8ff00; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Feature List Item
components.description: A checklist row: a single-stroke currentColor tick in faint ink beside a body-2 claim. Icons are always inline SVG, never emoji.
components.html:
• Goalkeepers get save tracking with their own save rate
  • Shot placement by goal zone, so you see where they beat you
components.css: .ds-list { list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0; display:grid; gap:12px; max-width:60ch; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-list li { display:flex; gap:11px; align-items:flex-start; font-size:0.97rem; color:#a7b0be; } .ds-list svg { width:17px; height:17px; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:4px; color:#7d8798; }

components.name: Pricing Plan Card
components.description: Raised ink-850 card with a Bebas name and price. Both plans share identical chrome; emphasis comes from the button alone.
components.html:
Personal
One coach, one team. You track your own matches and keep your own season.
Free trial
Then a personal subscription. Ask for the current rate.
Request access
components.css: .ds-plan { border:1px solid #252b38; border-radius:14px; padding:clamp(26px,3.4vw,38px); background:#12151c; display:flex; flex-direction:column; max-width:360px; font-family:'Manrope',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-plan-name { font-family:'Bebas Neue','Arial Narrow',sans-serif; font-size:2.1rem; line-height:1; margin-bottom:10px; color:#f0f2f6; } .ds-plan-for { font-size:0.95rem; color:#a7b0be; } .ds-plan-price { margin:26px 0 4px; font-family:'Bebas Neue','Arial Narrow',sans-serif; font-size:2.4rem; line-height:1; color:#f0f2f6; } .ds-plan-note { font-size:0.86rem; color:#7d8798; } .ds-plan-cta { margin-top:28px; width:100%; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:46px; padding:0 22px; border-radius:10px; background:#e8ff00; color:#0a0c10; font-weight:700; font-size:0.97rem; text-decoration:none; transition:background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-plan-cta:hover { background:#f2ff4d; } .ds-plan-cta:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #e8ff00; outline-offset:3px; }

narrative.overview: This is not a brochure for a tool, it is the tool holding still. The site behaves like the app it sells: a live scoreboard that actually ticks in the hero, real product screenshots rather than illustrated abstractions, and numbers instead of adjectives. The voice is precise, unhurried, and sideline-literate: it speaks like a coach who knows the sport, not like a SaaS company that has heard of it. The surface is a tinted near-black carrying a single electric-yellow accent rationed to almost nothing, left-aligned and calm, organised against a minute-stamped timeline rail the way a coach records a game.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted near-black canvas, blue-shifted, never pure #000 or #fff.
One accent (--volt yellow) rationed to under 10% of any screen.
Bebas Neue display over Manrope body; numbers always tabular.
A minute-stamped timeline rail as the load-bearing layout signature.
Bilingual: Dutch is the real page (in the HTML), English is layered on by i18n.js.
The product demonstrates itself: real screenshots, a real recording, a running clock.

rules.name: The Yellow Budget Rule
rules.body: --volt is permitted on exactly four things: the primary call to action, live numerals (clock and score), the active rail marker, and focus rings. A yellow heading, icon, or border is a bug. If everything is yellow, the trial button is not.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Extremes Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Darkest is #0a0c10, lightest is #f0f2f6, and every neutral is tinted toward blue.

rules.name: The Semantic-Dot Rule
rules.body: Event colors exist only as 6px log dots. The moment one becomes a background, heading, or border, it has left its lane.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numeral Rule
rules.body: Every numeral uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. A clock that reflows while ticking is a defect.

rules.name: The Bebas Floor Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue is reserved for 40px and above. Below 32px it reads cheap; never use it there.

rules.name: The Uppercase Lane Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is for the display face and short labels only, never body copy. Body line-height is 1.65 because light text on dark reads lighter than it measures.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are separated by tone (ink-850 on ink-900) and 1px ink-700 hairlines, not shadows. A drop shadow appears only on the scoreboard and screenshots.

dos: Do keep --volt (#e8ff00) to the four budgeted uses: primary call to action, live numerals, active rail marker, focus rings.
Do tint every neutral toward blue (hue ~258-265); darkest surface #0a0c10, lightest text #f0f2f6.
Do set all numerals in tabular-nums, and reserve Bebas Neue for 40px and up.
Do separate surfaces with tone and 1px ink-700 hairlines; use a shadow only on the scoreboard and screenshots.
Do show the product itself: real screenshots and the real recording, never illustrated abstractions.
Do state what the product does and let numbers be the voice. Speak sideline-literate.
Do edit copy in both places: the Dutch in the HTML and the matching English in i18n.js.
Do let the timeline rail be the only home for repeating small tracked labels.
Do keep the reveal class script-applied, the FAQ native <details>, and the hero simulation paused off-screen; these are robustness, not style.
donts: Don't ship generic sports-tech neon: dark plus glowing green plus a stadium photo plus 'ELEVATE YOUR GAME'.
Don't build enterprise analytics SaaS: no gradient-mesh hero, no three identical icon cards, no logo wall of clubs we do not have.
Don't drift into editorial-typographic minimalism or fitness-app maximalism.
Don't use breathless verbs: no revolutionise, unleash, game-changing, supercharge.
Don't invent social proof: no fabricated testimonials, club logos, user counts, or undecided prices. Empty is better than false.
Don't use #000, #fff, a yellow heading/icon/border, or an event color as anything but a 6px log dot.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, a hero-metric block, or emoji as icons.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't commit a recoloured Logo.png; the mark is recoloured in CSS so one file stays the source of truth.
